title: Super Mario Bros Castle Theme - Mario Paint Composer
description:
Sorry about any lag that may occur. I will get a better video recorder one day. Until then, enjoy this piece. It was the first real Mario Paint Composer song that I finished.

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: FreezScreen Video Capture - (not recommended)

All free, legal, and unlimited.
